workshoptitle: Oracle Linux Virtualization Manager (OLVM) on OCI

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Workshop audience, prerequisites, sequencing rules, and expected outcomes.

tutorials.title: Get Started
tutorials.description: Sign in to OCI and confirm access to the tenancy and compartment used for this workshop.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Setup OCI Infrastructure
tutorials.description: Create the bootstrap environment, run the provisioning playbook, and verify the OLVM hosts.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Deploy OLVM Engine
tutorials.description: Open the manager desktop securely, install OLVM Engine, and validate portal access.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Configure KVM Cluster
tutorials.description: Add both KVM hosts to the default cluster and wait for them to reach Up status.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Set Up Networking, Storage, and VM
tutorials.description: Create the VM network, add storage, import the template, and validate a test VM.

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Deploy Multi Tier Application
tutorials.description: Import the application OVAs, start the VMs, and verify the Employee Directory application.

tutorials.title: Lab 6: Perform Live Migration
tutorials.description: Migrate a running virtual machine between hosts and validate continuity.

tutorials.title: Lab 7: Manage Users and Roles
tutorials.description: Create users, assign roles, and verify role-based access in OLVM.

tutorials.title: Lab 8: Configure OCI NAT Gateway for VM Internet Access
tutorials.description: Create a NAT Gateway, add a route table, and associate it with the VLAN for outbound VM connectivity.

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Troubleshooting resources and directions for getting assistance during the workshop.
